vsig.description: Verification Signature (VSIG). Human or system verification artifact bound to a PIK. Used only as proof of verification activity and NOT as an identity authority component.

pik_reference.description: PIK this verification signature is bound to. REQUIRED for signature validity.

cir_reference.description: CIR-backed registry identity this VSIG is associated with. Required for traceability only. NOT an authority source.

algorithm.description: Algorithm used to produce the VSIG. This is a verification method descriptor only.

verification_context.description: Optional description of the verification event (e.g., avatar change, profile modification, login confirmation). NON-AUTHORITATIVE.

status.description: Lifecycle status of the verification signature.

metadata.description: Non-authoritative metadata. MUST NOT affect identity resolution, registry state, RBAC, federation, or exposure decisions.
